description: Create a complex GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on pull requests, pushes to master, and on a scheduled cron job. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test on different operating systems (ubuntu, macos), with various boost versions, compilers (g++, g++-8, clang++), and geos versions. For each matrix combination, it checks out the repository, sets up the environment, installs dependencies, builds and tests the project, and optionally runs code coverage and uploads the results to Coveralls.
